speaker: speaker1
text: I need to get my high speed internet installed .

speaker: speaker2
text: You'll need to make an appointment .

speaker: speaker1
text: Could I do that right now , please ?

speaker: speaker2
text: What day would you like us to do the installation ?

speaker: speaker1
text: You can't come any earlier than that ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm sorry . That's the only available time .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . Anytime on Saturday will be fine .

speaker: speaker2
text: We can do it . See you then .
